documentation.text:
@notice Somnia Agent Platform — dispatches work to the off-chain agent fleet.
 @dev Deployed at 0x037Bb9C718F3f7fe5eCBDB0b600D607b52706776 on Somnia testnet.
@notice Minimal aUSD interface — ERC-20 + mint for P&L settlement.

@title  VaultManager
 @author Aionis Team
 @notice Core contract for Aionis copy-trading.
 @dev    Each user creates one vault per leader they want to follow.
         aUSD is locked inside the vault and never sent to a DEX.
         When the leader trades, a three-stage agent pipeline fires:
         ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
         │  1. WATCHER  (JSON API Agent, id=1)                             │
         │     Fetches latest swap by the leader from the Aionis API.      │
         │                                                                 │
         │  2. STRATEGIST  (LLM Agent, id=2)                              │
         │     Evaluates trade + vault risk profile → copy score 0-100.   │
         │                                                                 │
         │  3. EXECUTOR  (on-chain, this contract)                        │
         │     Opens a virtual Position. No DEX swap. aUSD stays here.    │
         └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
         A separate price-update pipeline keeps latestPrice[token] fresh
         so getUnrealizedPnL() is always meaningful.
         P&L settlement on close:
           profit → aUSD minted into vault (VaultManager must be a minter)
           loss   → aUSD deducted from vault accounting
@notice vaultId(follower, leader) → vault config
@notice positionId → position
@notice follower → all their vault IDs
@notice vaultId → all position IDs (open + closed)
@notice follower → address allowed to trigger the agent pipeline on their behalf
@dev requestId → vaultId  (watcher and strategist callbacks share this)
@dev vaultId → raw trade bytes carried from watcher → strategist callback
@dev Timestamp when pipeline started; 0 = idle. Auto-expires after PIPELINE_TIMEOUT.
@notice token address → latest price × 1e10
@dev requestId → token address  (price callback lookup)
@dev position counter for unique IDs

documentation.text:
@notice Reopen a previously withdrawn (CLOSED) vault for the same leader,
         with a fresh deposit and config. The vaultId is derived solely from
         (follower, leader), so a closed vault can never be re-created via
         createVault — this is the only way back for that pair.

@notice Pause copy-trading for a vault (follower only).
         In-flight pipeline completes but no new ones start.
@notice Resume a paused vault (follower only).

@notice Add tokens to the vault allowlist in a single transaction.
 @param tokens Array of token addresses to allow. Duplicates are skipped.

arguments.value: You are a risk management engine for Aionis, a copy-trading platform on Somnia.
Evaluate the trade below and decide what percentage of the follower vault to allocate.
OUTPUT: Respond with ONLY a single integer 0-100. No explanation. No text. Just the number.
3. If trade USD value < $5 -> return 0 (noise trade, ignore).
4. If free balance < $10 -> return 0 (vault nearly empty).
Free balance < 10% of vault         -> reduce score by 30%
Trade size > 50% of free balance    -> reduce score by 20% (large relative exposure)
Trade size > 100% of free balance   -> return 0 (cannot afford)
SIGNAL STRENGTH (use trade size vs follower vault, NOT raw dollars):
Trade < 5% of follower vault        -> weak signal, lean conservative
Trade 5-20% of follower vault       -> moderate signal
Trade > 20% of follower vault       -> strong signal, leader is making a big move
Trade > 50% of follower vault       -> very strong signal
Trade age < 10s                     -> add up to 10 to final score
IMPORTANT: Do NOT treat $1000 as inherently significant.
A $1000 trade is strong if the follower vault is $2000 (50%).
A $1000 trade is weak if the follower vault is $100000 (1%).
Always reason in percentages, not absolute dollar amounts.

Team","details":"Each user creates one vault per leader they want to follow.         aUSD is locked inside the vault and never sent to a DEX.         When the leader trades, a three-stage agent pipeline fires:         \u250c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2510         \u2502  1. WATCHER  (JSON API Agent, id=1)                             \u2502         \u2502     Fetches latest swap by the leader from the Aionis API.      \u2502         \u2502                                                                 \u2502         \u2502  2. STRATEGIST  (LLM Agent, id=2)                              \u2502         \u2502     Evaluates trade + vault risk profile \u2192 copy score 0-100.   \u2502         \u2502                                                                 \u2502         \u2502  3. EXECUTOR  (on-chain, this contract)                        \u2502         \u2502     Opens a virtual Position. No DEX swap. aUSD stays here.    \u2502         \u2514\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2518         A separate price-update pipeline keeps latestPrice[token] fresh         so getUnrealizedPnL() is always meaningful.         P&L settlement on close:           profit \u2192 aUSD minted into vault (VaultManager must be a minter)           loss   \u2192 aUSD deducted from vault accounting","kind":"dev","methods":{"addToAllowlist(address,address[])":{"params":{"tokens":"Array of token addresses to allow. Duplicates are skipped."}},"checkLeaderActivity(address,address)":{"details":"Called by the follower themselves or their delegated keeper.         The watcher service calls this automatically when the leader trades.","params":{"follower":"The follower whose vault to check.","leader":"The leader whose latest trade to fetch."}},"closePosition(bytes32)":{"details":"Called by:           - The follower manually (stop-loss / take-profit)           - The keeper wallet when the leader sells         Profit \u2192 VaultManager mints aUSD into vault (must be a minter).         Loss   \u2192 aUSD deducted from vault accounting.","params":{"positionId":"The position to close."}},"createVault(address,uint256,uint8,uint8,address[])":{"params":{"allowlist":"Token addresses this vault is allowed to copy.                         Must contain at least one token \u2014 empty = no trades.","amount":"aUSD to lock (must be pre-approved).","leader":"Wallet to copy-trade.","maxPerTradePct":"Max % of vault per single trade (1-100).","riskLevel":"1 (conservative) \u2013 10 (aggressive). Passed to LLM."}},"onPriceUpdate(uint256,bytes)":{"details":"Response ABI-encoded as uint256 (price \u00d7 1e10)."},"onStrategistResponse(uint256,bytes)":{"details":"Response ABI-encoded as uint8 (0-100 copy score)."},"onWatcherResponse(uint256,bytes)":{"details":"Response ABI-encoded as:           (address tokenIn, address tokenOut, uint256 usdValue,            uint256 tradePrice, uint256 tradeTimestamp)"},"updatePrice(address)":{"params":{"token":"Token contract address (e.g. WSOMI)."}}},"stateVariables":{"_positionNonce":{"details":"position counter for unique IDs"},"pendingTradeData":{"details":"vaultId \u2192 raw trade bytes carried from watcher \u2192 strategist callback"},"pipelineActiveAt":{"details":"Timestamp when pipeline started; 0 = idle. Auto-expires after PIPELINE_TIMEOUT."},"priceRequestToToken":{"details":"requestId \u2192 token address  (price callback lookup)"},"requestToVault":{"details":"requestId \u2192 vaultId  (watcher and strategist callbacks share this)"}},"title":"VaultManager","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"addToAllowlist(address,address[])":{"notice":"Add tokens to the vault allowlist in a single transaction."},"checkLeaderActivity(address,address)":{"notice":"Trigger the copy-trade pipeline for a follower."},"closePosition(bytes32)":{"notice":"Close an open position and settle P&L."},"createVault(address,uint256,uint8,uint8,address[])":{"notice":"Create a new vault for a specific leader."},"deposit(address,uint256)":{"notice":"Top up an existing vault."},"followerVaults(address,uint256)":{"notice":"follower \u2192 all their vault IDs"},"getAllowlist(address,address)":{"notice":"Get the allowlist for a vault."},"getFollowerVaults(address)":{"notice":"Get all vault IDs for a follower."},"getFreeBalance(address,address)":{"notice":"aUSD in the vault not currently locked in positions."},"getOpenPositions(address,address)":{"notice":"Get all open position IDs for a vault."},"getUnrealizedPnL(address,address)":{"notice":"Aggregate unrealized P&L across all open positions in a vault.         Requires latestPrice to be populated for each token via updatePrice()."},"getVault(address,address)":{"notice":"Get a vault's full config."},"keeperOf(address)":{"notice":"follower \u2192 address allowed to trigger the agent pipeline on their behalf"},"latestPrice(address)":{"notice":"token address \u2192 latest price \u00d7 1e10"},"onPriceUpdate(uint256,bytes)":{"notice":"Called by the Somnia Agent Platform with the latest price."},"onStrategistResponse(uint256,bytes)":{"notice":"Called by the Somnia Agent Platform after the LLM Strategist         evaluates the trade."},"onWatcherResponse(uint256,bytes)":{"notice":"Called by the Somnia Agent Platform after the JSON API Agent         fetches the leader's latest swap from the Aionis API."},"pauseVault(address)":{"notice":"Pause copy-trading for a vault (follower only).         In-flight pipeline completes but no new ones start."},"positions(bytes32)":{"notice":"positionId \u2192 position"},"removeFromAllowlist(address,address[])":{"notice":"Remove tokens from the vault allowlist in a single transaction.         Vault must retain at least one token \u2014 removing all would freeze the vault."},"reopenVault(address,uint256,uint8,uint8,address[])":{"notice":"Reopen a previously withdrawn (CLOSED) vault for the same leader,         with a fresh deposit and config. The vaultId is derived solely from         (follower, leader), so a closed vault can never be re-created via         createVault \u2014 this is the only way back for that pair."},"resumeVault(address)":{"notice":"Resume a paused vault (follower only)."},"setKeeper(address)":{"notice":"Delegate a keeper address to trigger copy trades on your behalf.         Set to address(0) to revoke."},"updatePrice(address)":{"notice":"Dispatch a JSON API Agent request to update the on-chain price         for a given token. Called by the keeper after every leader swap."},"vaultId(address,address)":{"notice":"Deterministic vault ID: one vault per (follower, leader) pair."},"vaultPositions(bytes32,uint256)":{"notice":"vaultId \u2192 all position IDs (open + closed)"},"vaults(bytes32)":{"notice":"vaultId(follower, leader) \u2192 vault config"},"withdraw(address)":{"notice":"Withdraw all aUSD and close the vault.         Requires no open positions \u2014 close them first."}},"notice":"Core contract for Aionis copy-trading.","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"contracts/VaultManager.sol":"VaultManager"},"evmVersion":"paris","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":200},"remappings":[],"viaIR":true},"sources":{"contracts/VaultManager.sol":{"keccak256":"0xb898016dc2b9b6c72c2b545e61d672dc8aba66edd76074df438ac775a4661d15","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://4973b751e67b5caec3703a06a1a45bda7c0e3a246190944928a1403ac221641b","dweb:/ipfs/QmQLWpG7VYDHDKVZ8jkJjLsBneTWu8EcPh8c3b1eptpDER"]}},"version":1}
